creator: skreuzer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry for the delay in getting back to you. The patch you provided is in git format so it won't apply cleanly to an svn checkout without a lot of work. After looking at the git log for dump1090, it looks like the main change is a URL was updated and a typo was fixed. Since there are no new features of bug fixes I am going to close this PR.

Thanks
